title: Buster Pet Hair Plughole Unblocker, 900ml, Unblock Pet Hair from Plugholes, Baths, Showers and Basins-Fast-Acting & Dissolves All Types of Pet Hair
features: PET HAIR PLUGHOLE UNBLOCKER: Buster Pet Hair Plughole Unblocker (Pack of 1x 900ml) dissolves away all types of pet hair from plugholes, baths, showers and basins to remove stubborn blockages and keep your water draining fast
EFFECTIVE ON COARSE & FINE PETHAIR: Buster clears your plugholes of coarse and fine pet hair and neutralises animal odours for build-up-free plugholes and bathrooms that smell fresh

FOR SHOWERS, BATHS & BASINS: Buster Pet Hair Plughole Unblocker is specially formulated to tackle the pet hair build-up inside your bathroom pipes; it works great with all plugholes, showers, baths and basins and is safe to use on septic systems

STOPS SLOW DRAINING WATER & BLOCKAGES: Whether it’s a full blockage or slowdraining water, Buster’s fast-acting formula gets to work immediately to break down the oils inanimal fur, dissolve the build-up of hair and neutralise animal odours

YOUR PLUGHOLE EXPERTS: For over 30 years, we’ve worked obsessively to make plughole care products that are effective and simplyget the job done, from clearing and preventing blockages to cleaning and sanitising
description: Product Description Buster Pet Hair Plughole Unblocker (1x 900ml) is the plughole unblocker that blasts away pet hair and keeps pipes free from odours and sludge. Bathtime for pets is fun for everyone involved, but while your four-legged friend can scurry offand leave the mess behind them, for you it’s not quite so easy. That’s when Buster Pet Hair Unblocker becomes your new faithful friend. It quickly breaks down the oils in animal fur and dissolves the build-up of hair to leave your plugholes, showers, baths and basins flowing freely and smelling their best.Whether it’s a full blockage or slow draining water, using Buster Pet Hair Plughole Unblocker is easy. First, remove as much standing water as you can. Then carefully pour a third of the bottle (300ml) slowly down the plughole and wipe away any residue. Leave for at least 15 minutes (for best results leave overnight) and flush through with lots of hot water. Buster works obsessively to make the best, most effective plughole care products. From clearing and preventing blockages to cleaning and sanitising, when it comes to plughole care, we’re the experts who get the job done. Ingredients Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium hypochlorite, Sodium Salt, N,N-dimethyltetradecylamine N-oxide (amine oxide), perfume Directions 100 ml Safety Warning Read Label before use, very toxic to aquatic life, Keep out of reach of children and Not to be applied on Pets See more
